creator: yklaxds@gmail.com
text:
--- clean-temp.lo ---
libtool: compile:  cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -DEXEEXT=\"\" -DEXEEXT=\"\" -DEXEEXT=\"\" -I. -I.. -I../intl -I../intl -I.. -I.. -DDEPENDS_ON_LIBICONV=1 -DDEPENDS_ON_LIBINTL=1 -DLIBXML_STATIC -I./libcroco -I/usr/local/include -DLIBICONV_PLUG -D_THREAD_SAFE -O2 -pipe -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fno-strict-aliasing -c clean-temp.c -o clean-temp.o >/dev/null 2>&1
--- copy-file.lo ---
/bin/sh ../libtool  --tag=CC    --mode=compile cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -DEXEEXT=\"\" -DEXEEXT=\"\"  -DEXEEXT=\"\"  -I. -I..  -I../intl -I../intl  -I.. -I.. -DDEPENDS_ON_LIBICONV=1  -DDEPENDS_ON_LIBINTL=1 -DLIBXML_STATIC     -I./libcroco  -I/usr/local/include -DLIBICONV_PLUG -D_THREAD_SAFE   -O2 -pipe  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fno-strict-aliasing -c -o copy-file.lo copy-file.c
